assertions.expectation: Recommends increasing maxSurge significantly (e.g., 10-20 or higher) to parallelize node replacements
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends maxSurge=20 for non-critical pools and provides the specific gcloud command to set it

assertions.expectation: Explains that higher maxSurge means more nodes upgrading simultaneously but requires more compute quota
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains that maxSurge=20 requires +20 nodes worth of compute quota and discusses quota monitoring with specific commands

assertions.expectation: Advises checking and requesting increased compute quota before the upgrade
assertions.reason: Response provides specific command to monitor quota usage: 'gcloud compute project-info describe --project PROJECT_ID' and discusses quota requirements

assertions.expectation: Suggests staggering node pool upgrades or running non-conflicting pools in parallel
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed staggered strategy with specific commands for upgrading different pools across multiple weekends

assertions.expectation: Mentions that maxUnavailable can be set >0 for non-critical pools to speed things up further
assertions.reason: Response consistently sets maxUnavailable=0 for all pools and does not suggest setting it >0 for non-critical pools to speed up upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends expanding the maintenance window or splitting across multiple weekends
assertions.reason: Response provides both extended maintenance window configuration with gcloud command and detailed multi-weekend staggered approach

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for updating surge settings on each pool
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud container node-pools update commands with specific flags for maxSurge and maxUnavailable settings

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to track upgrade progress in real-time
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple monitoring commands: watch command for node status, gcloud operations list, and pod eviction monitoring
